name: where_to_buy_7_pages_where-to-buy

observed_strengths.observation: 'Find in Stores' CTA present on the 404 page — indicates mudwtr has retail distribution and includes retail discovery as a navigation option even from error pages, suggesting brick-and-mortar presence

404 page includes full product navigation links (Coffee, Original, Matcha, Turmeric, Rest, Protein, StrawberryMatcha) — the error page doesn't dead-end visitors but redirects to the full product catalog

missing_or_weak.observation: /pages/where-to-buy returns 404 (canonical: /404) — retail store finder does not exist at the standard URL. Visitors arriving via organic search for 'where to buy MUD\WTR' land on a dead page with no store locator
Retail distribution extent is unknown — no store locator page found; the 'Find in Stores' CTA links to an unknown destination (not visible in the crawled link structure)

purchase_path_notes: Where-to-buy is a 404. If mudwtr has meaningful retail distribution (Whole Foods, Target, etc.), this is a missed organic SEO and retail discovery opportunity. Broken Links check in technical_checks.json records this URL.
